style_prompt: Convert this image into an unmistakable Pixar-style 3D animated cartoon frame. The ENTIRE scene — people, clothing, props, and background — must look like a still from a high-end 3D animated feature film, never like a photograph or a lightly filtered photo: stylized cartoon rendering throughout, soft cinematic lighting, rich saturated colors, gently rounded simplified forms, smooth stylized cartoon skin with no photorealistic skin texture or pores, simplified painterly backgrounds, and expressive animation-studio shading. LIKENESS IS CRITICAL: the people must remain instantly recognizable as the same real individuals, as if this exact family were cast as characters in a Pixar-style film about themselves. Preserve each person's true facial structure and proportions: face shape, jawline, chin, nose size and shape, REAL eye size and spacing (do not enlarge the eyes), eyebrow shape and thickness, lip shape, their actual hairstyle, hairline and hair color, skin tone, age, and body type, plus distinctive features (freckles, moles, glasses, facial hair). Stylize the rendering, not the person: do not slim faces, smooth away distinguishing features, or beautify anyone into a generic cartoon character. Preserve the original composition, camera angle, subject placement, clothing, and scene content. Output in 16:9.
scratch_style_prompt: Create Pixar-style 3D animated cartoon visuals — every frame must look like a still from a high-end 3D animated feature film, never photorealistic: soft cinematic lighting, expressive character design, clean rounded shapes, rich saturated colors, smooth stylized cartoon skin, simplified painterly backgrounds, and high-quality animation-studio rendering. Keep the visual identity consistent across all frames.
motion_prompt: Natural, continuous in-scene motion connecting the start frame to the end frame: the characters and environment move and evolve believably, with camera movement only as needed to follow the action. Preserve each person's identity, environment, colors, and composition. If the people in the two frames are different individuals, the first person exits the frame or passes behind something while the other enters or is revealed — never transform or morph one person into another. No sudden cuts, no text, no distortion, no camera shake. The final frame should closely match the provided end image.
default_sfx_prompt: Ambient sound and natural sound effects matching the on-screen action. No music, no speech, no narration.
music_prompt: Soft cinematic instrumental underscore, gentle and warm, no vocals.
